custom-sql.sql: SELECT AssetCategory.categoryId FROM AssetCategory INNER JOIN AssetCategoryProperty ON AssetCategoryProperty.categoryId = AssetCategory.categoryId INNER JOIN AssetCategory AS AssetCategory2 ON AssetCategory2.categoryId = AssetCategory.parentCategoryId INNER JOIN AssetCategoryProperty AS AssetCategoryProperty2 ON AssetCategoryProperty2.categoryId = AssetCategory2.categoryId WHERE (AssetCategory.vocabularyId = ?) AND (AssetCategoryProperty.key_ = ?) AND (AssetCategoryProperty.value = ?) AND (AssetCategoryProperty2.key_ = ?) AND (AssetCategoryProperty2.value = ?)
